content.text:
<user_query>
In @docs/development-plan-v1.md section 12.5, there is no manual testing until T11. Can't items be manually tested earlier?
</user_query>

Reading section 12.5 in the development plan to see how manual testing is sequenced.

[REDACTED]

Checking ticket prompts for manual verification before T11:

[REDACTED]

Here is how the plan actually reads, and how it fits together.

## Section 12.5 already has manual work before T11

The **0.5** manual matrix has **two** rows. The second is explicitly earlier:

```592:592:c:\Users\Ken Levy\OneDrive\Documents\Business\Ohana\Memories\docs\development-plan-v1.md
| **0.5**   | Authz isolation                          | T4,T10          | User A JWT cannot open User B client                                                              | 403 detail/list                                   | Manual / date |
```

So **authz isolation** is meant to be exercised and signed off once **T4** (authz middleware) and **T10** (web list/detail wiring) exist—not after the capture stepper.

**T10** also tells implementers to start informal manual coverage:

```415:415:c:\Users\Ken Levy\OneDrive\Documents\Business\Ohana\Memories\docs\development-plan-v1.md
**Verify:** Vitest/component tests where practical; manual smoke checklist started.
```

So the plan already allows (and nudges toward) **incremental** manual smoke before T11; it is not “no manual testing until T11” if you use both the matrix and the T10 verify line.

## Why the first 0.5 row starts at T11

The row **“Guided capture saves one memory”** lists **T11, T12, T14** because that scenario is the **full golden path** (photo → meta → record → save, plus airplane mode / resume). That path does not exist as a product flow until the **capture stepper (T11)** and the **offline/idempotency behavior (T12)** are in place; **T14** is when automated smoke is expected to lock the same path in CI.

You can still **manually** try pieces earlier (e.g. list/detail after **T9/T10**, signing or finalize behavior with tools or partial UI), but those are **not** spelled out as separate §12.5 sign-off rows today.

## If you want the doc to say that more loudly

Reasonable doc tweaks (only if you want them): add **extra §12.5 rows** for interim sign-offs—for example **list/detail/playback** after **T9–T10**, or **API-only JWT / 403** checks right after **T4**—so QA does not have to infer that from “Authz isolation” alone. Functionally, **yes, items can be manually tested earlier**; the matrix is a **release** checklist, not a prohibition on exploratory or story-level manual testing before T11.

[REDACTED]

<user_query>
Yes, please add more manual test granularity as you suggest
</user_query>

Reading the manual matrix and ticket definitions to add granular rows aligned with the ticket breakdown.
